disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.subtitle: This page clarifies content nature, risk boundaries, and citation principles to avoid misinterpreting personal notes as professional commitments.
disclaimer.item1Desc: Content on this site is primarily for personal learning notes, design organization, and engineering experience archiving, and may have limitations in timeliness or simplified expressions.
disclaimer.item2Desc: Content on this site does not constitute formal advice on legal, medical, investment, security, or business matters, nor does it replace professional judgment and formal documentation.
disclaimer.item3Desc: If you execute scripts, modify configurations, or adjust deployment environments based on this site's content, please verify in a test environment first and bear the corresponding risks.
disclaimer.item4Desc: External links on this site are provided only as reference entry points or sample references. The availability, accuracy, and security of third-party content are not guaranteed by this site.
disclaimer.item5Desc: Unless otherwise noted, original content is intended for learning and exchange; cited content will include source attribution where possible. Contact us for corrections or removal if needed.
disclaimer.item6Desc: This site continues to be updated along with the refactoring progress. If old documentation, screenshots, or path descriptions are inconsistent with the current implementation, the latest version in the repository takes precedence.

error404.title: Page Not Found
error404.description: This address has no matching content, but your blog is still here. You can search directly or continue browsing from recent articles.
error404.notFound: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
